title: Warm Crispy Filipino Peppers Kare Kare
description: A lazy Sunday Filipino dish featuring crispy peppers and nuka-pickle in a rich peanut sauce, this Warm Crispy Filipino Peppers Kare Kare is perfect for a relaxing day at home. It is halal-friendly and made with grassy and crispy ingredients.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the peppers to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine the peanut butter, coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar, and blend until smooth.
Add the blended sauce to the skillet with the peppers and stir to combine.
Add the nuka-pickle to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes.
Serve the Warm Crispy Filipino Peppers Kare Kare hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
